name: UBA : Large number of denied access events towards external domain
notes: Detects when there are abnormal number of denied access events towards any external domain.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Denied, Access.ACL Deny, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.IPS Deny
when the destination is Remote
when at least 20 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 20 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Large number of denied access events towards external domain on events which are detected by the GLOBAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Denied, Access.ACL Deny, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.IPS Deny
AND when the destination is Remote
AND when at least 20 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Large number of denied access events towards external domain
